creator: scott.loga@me.com
text:
On the FreeBSD Wiki (https://wiki.freebsd.org) under the Platforms Section there is a entry for XEN.  The XEN hyperlink redirects the page to https://wiki.freebsd.org/FreeBSD/Xen.  However, this is not the most current status wiki page for XEN.  The most current page is found at
https://wiki.freebsd.org/FreeBSD/XenNG.  Please update the URL.
